fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service document that has undergone changes.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item line, if the event is linked to a service item line.

fields.name: After
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of the modified field after the event takes place.

fields.name: Before
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of the modified field before the event takes place.

fields.name: Change Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the event.

fields.name: Change Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time of the event.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service document that underwent changes.
